summary: Underrated show with a soaring Dark Star into High Time, solid performance despite unknown recording source.
review: Fans rave about the dark, exploratory stretch of Dark Star that flows into a fiery High Time, and they love Pigpen’s standout moments. The set also marks the first appearance of Black Peter and Uncle John’s Band for many listeners. No specific comments on the tape quality were provided, so the recording source remains unknown.

ai_rating.rationale: Two enthusiastic 5‑star reviews highlight exceptional performance; a third moderate 3‑star review adds balance. Recording quality is not discussed, so the rating leans on show strength.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Reviewers did not comment on sound clarity, mix, or source; no audio issues were noted.

show_quality.setlist_flow: First appearances of Black Peter and Uncle John's Band are mentioned, but the highlight is a powerful Dark Star that segues into High Time, suggesting an energetic and well‑paced set.

band_member_comments.Keys: Pigpen's vocals/organ work praised as a high point of the night.
